# Sound Blog

> Sound Blog turns voice recordings into polished, publish-ready blog posts with AI transcription, rewriting, editing, and text-to-speech playback.

Sound Blog is a web application for creators, founders, writers, marketers, students, and teams in the USA and Europe who prefer speaking their ideas before publishing them as written content.

## Core Capabilities

- Record audio in the browser or upload an audio file.
- Validate user access and available credits before processing.
- Transcribe voice recordings into text.
- Generate structured blog posts from transcripts.
- Let users choose tone, target length, structure, and content enhancements.
- Edit generated Markdown blog drafts.
- Generate text-to-speech playback for completed blog posts.

## Public Pages

- [Home](https://sound-blog.com/): Product overview and demo.
- [Pricing](https://sound-blog.com/pricing): Free, Hobby, and Pro plans.

## Product Positioning

Sound Blog is best described as an AI voice-to-blog generator, AI writing assistant, audio transcription workflow, and content creation tool for turning spoken thoughts into publishable articles.

## Ownership

Created by Shatlyk Abdullayev.

- Website: https://sound-blog.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/shatlyk1011/sound-blog

## Contact Placeholder

Support email is not public yet. Add it to `siteConfig.supportEmail` when available.

## Search Console Placeholder

Google Search Console verification is prepared in `siteConfig.googleSiteVerification`.

## Social Image Placeholder

The final social preview image should be a 1200x630 image and can be configured in `siteConfig.ogImage`.
